programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Rick faces a choice when a vendor presents model F1 cars. Meanwhile, Rick and Corey examine an autographed Taylor Swift guitar.

programs.title: Storage Wars
programs.desc: Lisa returns to Moreno Valley, where it all started and gets nostalgic with her locker. Meanwhile, Kenny welcomes a new granddaughter to the clan.

programs.desc: While Darrell helps Kimber with her new botique, Kenny remains confident in his plan in Stanton, California. Realising her need for a distraction, Rene brings Casey along.

programs.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programs.desc: Explore some of the interesting and bizarre revenge stories, including the one about a Colorado man who used a killdozer to settle a dispute and an emperor's vengeance towards his wife's lover.
